summary: Tested responsive layout for /damages page (Кабінет шкоди). All responsive breakpoints working correctly: Desktop (1920px) shows 3 columns, Tablet (768px) shows 2 columns, Mobile (375px) shows 1 column. Toolbar properly stacks (flex-col) on mobile with title/refresh on first row and search on second row. All column headers visible, search input functional, Quick Add popover works on mobile, refresh button accessible on all viewports.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Line 885: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 - responsive grid working correctly
✅ Line 845: flex flex-col sm:flex-row - toolbar stacking correctly on mobile (verified flexDirection: column at 375px)
✅ Line 887: h-[60vh] md:h-[70vh] lg:h-full - column heights responsive
✅ Line 851: sm:hidden - mobile refresh button visible only on mobile
✅ Line 875: hidden sm:block - desktop refresh button hidden on mobile
✅ data-testid attributes present: damage-hub-columns, wash-column, restore-column, laundry-column, damage-hub-search, quick-add-popover

mobile_layout_375px.toolbar: PASS - flex-direction: column (title row stacks above search row)

ui_elements.column_headers: PASS - all 3 headers visible (Мийка, Реставрація, Пральня)
ui_elements.column_heights: PASS - 60vh on mobile, 70vh on tablet, full on desktop

verified_features.no_overflow_issues: PASS - no horizontal overflow detected on any viewport

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 28: Responsive layout for /damages page fully tested. Grid responsive breakpoints working: 1 col (mobile), 2 cols (tablet md:768px), 3 cols (desktop lg:1024px+). Toolbar stacks correctly on mobile. Column heights adjust per breakpoint. All interactive elements accessible on mobile. Queues may show 'Порожньо' or 'Завантаження...' as expected empty state.
